item.title: concrete sealant, sealants waterproofing, roof seal bunnings, water sealant, clear concrete sealant, sealant tape waterproof, water based concrete sealant, silicone sealant waterproof, best concrete sealant, concrete sealant paint, silicone waterproofing, silicone sealant waterproof, waterproof silicone bunnings, waterproof silicone sealant bunnings, silicone tape waterproof, bunnings waterproof silicone, water resistant sealant, silicone water sealant, waterproof silicone sealant for pools,
item.description: The Kodex KS100 is a versatile, single component, 100% silicone sealant ideal for sealing building joints and glazing systems. It offers excellent UV and weather resistance making it suitable for use in kitchens, bathrooms, showers, and other areas. Additionally, it is suitable for joint sealing in precast concrete and brickwork as well as for industrial applications where control of fungi growth is required. Ideal for perimeter and curtain wall sealing, glazing systems and cap beading.

item.description: Looking for expert bathroom waterproofing ? Our team expert in shower and bathroom floor waterproofing to ensure protection against moisture and water damage.

item.title: Kodex PU Top Coat: A Durable, Flexible, Waterproof and Eco-Friendly Coating Solution
item.description: Get a durable, waterproof and eco-friendly solution for your surfaces with Kodex PU Top Coat. This top coat forms a seamless, flexible, and UV stable coating that meets 'Green Star' environmental standards.

item.title: Kodex UVR PU: The Ultimate Single Component Liquid for Exterior Polyurea/Polyurethane Hybrid Membrane
item.description: It is designed for applications such as roofing, flooring, waterproofing, and protective coatings. The quick cure time, durability, and versatility make Kodex UVR PU an ideal choice for both residential and commercial projects.

item.title: Australian Kodex Waterproofing Membranes - Durable and Reliable Solutions for Your Building
item.description: This high-performance product provides exceptional protection against UV light and water damage, making it ideal for use in outdoor concrete surfaces, foundations, and balconies. item.description: odex NEP is the perfect solution for waterproofing concrete, cement and cement block work, FC sheeting, Hebel, render, brick, plaster board, and masonry surfaces. Its tough and durable elastomeric formula provides long-lasting protection against moisture damage. With its easy single pack application, moisture curing and cross-linking technology, Kodex NEP is a reliable and efficient waterproofing membrane.

item.title: Kodex NPP: The Solvent-Free Solution for Your Priming Needs
item.description: Kodex NPP is a high-quality, solvent-free primer that offers excellent adhesion and protection for your surfaces. Ideal for a variety of surfaces, this primer is easy to apply and dries quickly to a smooth finish.

item.description: Kodex SB Primer is a versatile primer that can be used on a variety of surfaces, including concrete, brick, compressed cement sheeting, Villaboard, plywood and more.
